heading: Improve Your Results
body:
To optimize your RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications,
ensure that you're using a powerful embedding model like
[Voyage AI](https://docs.voyageai.com/docs/introduction)
to generate high-quality vector embeddings.

Additionally, MongoDB Vector Search supports advanced retrieval systems.
You can seamlessly index vector data along with your other
data in your cluster. This allows you to improve your results
by [lexical prefilters](vectorSearch-agg-pipeline-filter)
on other fields in your collection or performing
[How to Perform Hybrid Search](as_hybrid-search) that combine semantic search
with full-text search results.
